reason: Identity architecture rules: OIDC+PKCE, local app sessions, SubBoost allowlist boundary
Reusable OIDC client contract for SubBoost and future apps
SubBoost local auth analysis and recommended OIDC integration shape
Interface contracts for authorize, token, userinfo, SubBoost login start and callback
Created HMAC-signed transaction cookie library (state/nonce/codeVerifier/redirectUri) with MoauthTxError + cookie options
Created login start route: PKCE verifier/challenge, state, nonce, signed tx cookie, 302 to Connect authorize

Created callback route: state validation, code+PKCE exchange, JWKS ID token verify (issuer/audience/nonce/clockTolerance), userinfo subject cross-check, allowlist provisioning (LOGIN_EXISTING/BIND_AND_LOGIN/DENY), local session cookie
Added LocalAdmin.identitySubjectId String? @unique column for OIDC subject binding
Prisma migration adding identitySubjectId column with unique index
Added '使用 MoAuth 账号登录' anchor to /api/auth/moauth/login in local login UI
Added @moauth/connect-contract file dependency + jose v6.2.3 + vitest v4.1.7 devDep
Added @moauth/connect-contract alias to resolve connect-contract src
